_doc: Tepna release ledger — the machine-readable history of controlled releases (CONTROLLED-RELEASES-2026-07-05). The NEWEST entry in `releases` is the current release; its `version` MUST equal suite.manifest.json.version (the canonical current pointer). The `release-ledger` gate in tests/dex-tests.js asserts: no fork (newest==manifest), versions unique + strictly SemVer-increasing, every release has a matching CHANGELOG.md section, and 'unreleased code needs an unreleased changeset' (per-app manifestHashes snapshot vs BUILD-MANIFEST.json). Cut ONLY by tools/release.mjs from an all-green tree — NEVER hand-edit a version or a manifestHash snapshot. CHANGELOG.md is the human view over this file. Maps to IEC 62304 §8.3 configuration status accounting — see docs/COMPLIANCE/CONFIGURATION-MANAGEMENT-PLAN.md.

releases.name: Baseline
releases.notes: First controlled release. Declares the current all-gates-green tree as the 1.0.0 baseline; establishes suite versioning, the changelog, the changeset flow, the release-ledger gate, and the 62304/13485-aligned compliance doc set. The `briefs` list here is a curated set of milestone families; the FULL reconstructed development history (pre-1.0.0 waves 0.1.0-0.9.0) lives in CHANGELOG.md and is RECONSTRUCTED from the DONE brief corpus — those waves were NOT formally cut releases, so no per-app manifestHash snapshot is claimed for them. Concurrent OWN-THE-BUILD Part C / docs-ledger follow-up work landing after this cut ships as post-1.0.0 changesets.
